title: Data capture device
abstract: A data capture device for monitoring an individual is provided. The device comprises a sensor for measuring one or more parameters relevant to an injury/illness, and means for transmitting data therefrom.
claims: Claims 1. A data capture device for monitoring an individual, comprising a sensor for measuring one or more parameters relevant to an injury/illness, and means for transmitting data therefrom. 2. A device as claimed in claim I , in which the parameters include one or more of: inclination; orientation; acceleration. 3. A device as claimed in claim I or claim 2, in which the parameters include one or more of: inter-fragmentary movement; deformation; strain. 4. A device as claimed in any preceding claim, in which the parameters include one or more of: temperature; oxygen level; nicotine presence; blood pressure; heart rate. 5. A device as claimed in any preceding claim, in which data is transmitted using a short-range wireless communications protocol. 6. A device as claimed in any preceding claim, in which data is transmitted using a near field communications protocol. 7. A device as claimed in any preceding claim, in which data is transmittable to a proxy for onward transmission. 8. A device according to any preceding claim, comprising means for providing feedback to the individual. 9. A device according to any preceding claim, in which the device comprises an accelerometer or an IMU. 10. A system for monitoring and/or optimising the healing process of an afflicted individual, comprising a data capture device which can measure one or more parameters and means for transmitting data from the device. 1 1. A system as claimed in claim 10, further comprising processing means for analysing the data. 12. A system as claimed in claim I I , in which processing means is provided locally and/or remotely. I 3. A system as claimed in any of claims 10 to 12, comprising means for providing feedback to the individual. 14. A bone fixation monitoring system comprising as device or system as claimed in any preceding claim. 15. A musculo-skeletal monitoring system comprising a device or system as claimed in any of claims I to I 3. 16. An orthopaedic monitoring system comprising or including a device or system as claimed in any preceding claim. 17. An ankle fracture elevation monitoring device, comprising means for monitoring elevation. 18. A device as claimed in claim 15, further comprising an indicator for indicating if a patient's ankle is below a predetermined threshold elevation value. 19. A method for monitoring compliance with medical instructions comprising the steps of: defining one or more instructions determining one or more measurements correlatalbe with the or each instruction; and providing a device to monitor the one or more measurements and from which measurement data can be accessed. 20. A method as claimed in claim 19, in which data is transmitted from the device for determination of correlation/s.
